text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower isn't looking well, so I take her to
the infirmary to get some rest.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um, I'm really sorry for this. I'll get better right
away, so please just wait a little while.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Ah, there you are! We've been looking all over for
you!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: U-um... You were looking for me?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
We need an older student to supervise our
training session today, and that's you, Flower! I've
really been looking forward to this!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Older... student... I'm all grown up now!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff... So? What did you think of my running?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um... Your final spurt was picture perfect.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But I thought your overall pace during the lap was
a little inconsistent.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Oh, I see! Thank you so much for your advice!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
...U-um! If you have the time to spare, could you
help me with my homework after this?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Wha—hey! She's already promised to watch over
my training session next!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Well, then I can wait until after you're done!
Please, Flower!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: O-of course. I'd be more than happy to help!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um, but let's all calm down a little... I'll help you
all in order!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Are you sure it's not too much?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Not to worry. After all, I'm everyone's...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Dependable senior!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh? Was that... a dream? But those smiles...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'll make them a reality one day! I just need to do
my best!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After having a wonderful dream, Nishino Flower
feels thoroughly refreshed in both mind and
body.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: No fair! I was going to ask her to help me study after training!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A and B
text_block_list.text:
She can help you tomorrow!
No, you can be the one to wait!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: E-excuse me! There's no need to—

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh! Was that... a dream? What a relief, but...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I guess I've still got a long way to go before
everyone sees me as a dependable senior...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower has a bad dream, and her
condition fails to improve.
